text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh… I'm super nervous about the next test… But I have to make sure I pass!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Maybe I can turn my study 
materials into a song!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I am great when it comes to songwriting☆ I'll start with a song about history, then one for science, and a short poem as interlude!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I bet it'd be super popular with other people
who suck at studying! It might even make it 
to number one on the charts☆
